A focused Portuguese verb trainer built for daily practice.

  • 500+ verbs with real example sentences
  • All major tenses — presente, pretérito perfeito, imperfeito, futuro, condicional, subjuntivo
  • Smart frequency weighting & learning presets
  • Voice dictation with instant feedback 🎤
  • Text-to-speech pronunciation 🔊
  • Full conjugation tables for every verb 📖
  • Offline support (PWA)

Progress and settings save automatically.

Portuguese Verb Patterns & Tips

-AR Verbs (Present)

Endings: o, as, a, amos, ais, am

Rhyme: ”eu -o, tu -as, ele -a... nós -amos, vós -ais, eles -am”

Example: falar → eu falo, tu falas, ele fala, nós falamos...

-ER Verbs (Present)

Endings: o, es, e, emos, eis, em

Rhyme: ”eu -o, tu -es, ele -e... nós -emos, vós -eis, eles -em”

Example: comer → eu como, tu comes, ele come, nós comemos...

-IR Verbs (Present)

Endings: o, es, e, imos, is, em

Note: Like -ER but nós → -imos, vós → -is

Example: partir → eu parto, tu partes, ele parte, nós partimos...

Key Irregular Verbs

ser: sou, és, é, somos, sois, são

estar: estou, estás, está, estamos, estais, estão

ter: tenho, tens, tem, temos, tendes, têm

ir: vou, vais, vai, imos, ides, vão

Tip: ser = permanent identity; estar = temporary state/location.

Quick Help

  • Tap almost anywhere to reveal the answer, then tap again to move on.
  • Use Settings to choose which tenses and which verb ranges are in play. If you are starting out, use Top 50 verbs with the most common tenses.
  • Hear plays the prompt before reveal and the answer after reveal. Say lets you answer aloud and get dictation feedback.
  • Usage shows or hides the example lines while you drill. Most Portuguese text is playable, including usages and verb details.
  • Search opens any verb and its full conjugation table.
